reasoning: Koren, your primary limiter is poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. This workout mimics the demands of the Sundance to Cascade Springs climb on the Alpine Loop. Considering your last ride was at a low intensity, we're focusing on sustained efforts with power variations to enhance lactate management and aerobic endurance.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 4x10 min sets of over-unders: 2 min at 242-256W, 3 min at 201-218W. 2 min easy spin between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
